name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 19 Jun 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.57"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Catch sellers can now list products without a barcode through Neto. Instead, the product SKU will be used as the listing's MPN. Note that Catch still reviews the data for each product registered to ensure integrity."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"A new setting has been introduced to turn the newsletter subscription checkbox on the checkout page to \"opt out\", rather than opt in. You can find this in the "},{"text":"Webstore ","bold":true},{"text":"> "},{"text":"Checkout Settings ","bold":true},{"text":"page."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where unregistered users were being subscribed to newsletters when the \"subscribe to newsletter\" box was not selected."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
